filter_results.name: B1: All trades baseline
filter_results.mechanism: Baseline universe of all signals.

filter_results.name: B2: V14-live setups only
filter_results.mechanism: V14 live universe (SC/AG/VPB/VIX Div).

filter_results.name: F1: LONG + align==+1
filter_results.mechanism: Mild bullish alignment - dealers tilt long without chasing, leaves clean upside.

filter_results.name: F2: LONG + align>=+2
filter_results.mechanism: Strong bullish alignment - all Greeks WITH the trade. Force alignment principle.

filter_results.name: F3: SHORT + align==-3
filter_results.mechanism: All Greeks against price - dealer positioning offers no support, short fades face zero resistance.

filter_results.name: F4: SHORT + align<=-1
filter_results.mechanism: Any bearish-aligned short.

filter_results.name: F5: LONG + paradigm BOFA-PURE
filter_results.mechanism: BofA-driven long paradigm with no LIS interference.

filter_results.name: F6: SHORT + paradigm in AG-PURE/BofA-LIS
filter_results.mechanism: Pure AG bear paradigm OR LIS-resistance pattern - both produce clean reversals.

filter_results.name: F7: AG Short + AG-aligned paradigm
filter_results.mechanism: Track B PE filter F12 applied to clean-entry universe.

filter_results.name: F8: AG Short setup
filter_results.mechanism: Highest base PE rate in Track B (31.3%); test if CLEAN_ENTRY rate also elevated.

filter_results.name: F9: SC Long + alignment >= +1
filter_results.mechanism: SC long bias for clean entries.

filter_results.name: F10: VIX Divergence longs
filter_results.mechanism: VIX Div longs-only Strategy B (V14 live).

filter_results.name: F11: SC Short + AG-aligned paradigm
filter_results.mechanism: SC short with bear paradigm support.

filter_results.name: F12: 14-15 ET window
filter_results.mechanism: Charm acceleration into close, dealer positioning resolution.

filter_results.name: F13: 10-11 ET window
filter_results.mechanism: Opening drive resolution window.

filter_results.name: F14: LONG + BOFA-PURE + align>=+1
filter_results.mechanism: Combine clean long paradigm + supportive alignment.

filter_results.name: F15: SHORT + (AG-PURE OR align==-3)
filter_results.mechanism: Either dealer-AGG clean OR all Greeks against bull: ideal short conditions.

filter_results.name: F16: V14-live + align away from 0
filter_results.mechanism: V14 universe with any non-neutral alignment.

filter_results.name: F17: |gap_to_lis|<5 (near LIS)
filter_results.mechanism: Price near LIS - magnet/support effect creates clean entries.

filter_results.name: F18: LONG + gap_to_lis between 0 and 30
filter_results.mechanism: Long while above LIS but not too far - LIS as floor.

filter_results.name: F19: SHORT + gap_to_lis between -30 and 0
filter_results.mechanism: Short while below LIS - LIS as ceiling.

filter_results.name: F20: Grade A+/A only
filter_results.mechanism: Highest-grade signals only.

filter_results.name: F21: SC long V14-style (align in any except block list)
filter_results.mechanism: V14 SC long rule applied retroactively.

filter_results.name: F22: SC long + align==+1 + BOFA-PURE
filter_results.mechanism: Tight SC long sweet spot: mild bull alignment + clean BofA paradigm. 42% CE rate found in exploration.

filter_results.name: F23: SC long + align in (1,2) ANY paradigm except SIDIAL-EXTREME
filter_results.mechanism: SC long mid-bullish alignment - block extreme regime only.

filter_results.name: F24: ES Abs LONG + align==+1 + GEX paradigm (GEX-LIS, GEX-PURE)
filter_results.mechanism: ES Abs long with mild bull alignment under GEX paradigm: 75/68% WR found in exploration.

filter_results.name: F25: SHORT entries when paradigm == AG-PURE
filter_results.mechanism: Clean AG paradigm shorts - dealers fully short-aligned, no LIS interference.

filter_results.name: F26: AG Short EXCLUDING AG-TARGET paradigm
filter_results.mechanism: AG-TARGET paradigm wrecks AG Short (-38pts, 0% CE). Carve out to lift quality.

filter_results.name: F27: V14-live + SHORT + alignment in (-3,-1)
filter_results.mechanism: V14 universe constrained to bear-aligned shorts only.

filter_results.name: F28: V14-live + LONG + alignment in (1,2)
filter_results.mechanism: V14 universe constrained to mild-to-strong bull-aligned longs.

filter_results.name: F29: SC Long V14 + LONG sweet alignment
filter_results.mechanism: SC Long V14 refined: 1-2 alignment, drop SIDIAL-EXTREME.

filter_results.name: F30: VPB strong alignment (align==-3 or +2)
filter_results.mechanism: VPB sweet alignment - both ends had 85-100% WR (n<30 caveat).
